Class UsageChart

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.UsageChart
public class UsageChart extends Object
Screen Controller for the Usage Chart Shows the user events within a 3-week timeframe, showing information about each event through clickable, coloured bars
Version:
7.0 April 7 2025
Author:
Neil Daya

    Helper class to make event bars clickable

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      FXML initialiser method Populates the venues table and draws the timeline, chart and events

    • drawChartBase

      private void drawChartBase()
      Draws the background of the chart

    • drawTimeline

      private void drawTimeline()
      Draws the timeline, showing a timeframe between last Monday and next Monday

    • drawEvents

      private void drawEvents()
      Draws the events as bars on top of the background

    • getTextWidth

      private double getTextWidth(String text, javafx.scene.text.Font font)
      Helper method which gets the width of the host of an event's name to help check if it needs to be truncated on the bar
      Parameters:
      text - client name to be checked
      font - font of the text
      Returns:
      width of the client name

    • displayEventDetails

      private void displayEventDetails(Event event)
      Displays the information of the clicked bar
      Parameters:
      event - the event that has been selected

    • clearEventDetails

      private void clearEventDetails()
      Clear event details when the bar is deselected

    • changeWeek

      public void changeWeek(int weeks)
      Adjusts the dates on the timeline according to the navigation buttons
      Parameters:
      weeks - determines whether to shift right or left
